title: 3 GR Badgers in CSA Hub Invitational Team
description: GARDENROUTE NEWS - Three players of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - Three players of the Garden Route Badgers were selected for the Hub Invitational Team that will participate in the 65th edition of the Oppenheimer Michaelmas Cricket Week from 4 to 7 October at Maritzburg College in Pietermaritzburg.","html":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - Three players of the Garden Route Badgers were selected for the Hub Invitational Team that will participate in the 65th edition of the Oppenheimer Michaelmas Cricket Week from 4 to 7 October at Maritzburg College in Pietermaritzburg."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The players are Kurt Botha (Rosemoor Hub, George High), Keano Coerecius (Bridgton Hub; Bridgton Senior Secondary) and Enathi Kitshini (Thembalethu Hub, Thembalethu High)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the end of Michaelmas Week, the team that will participate in the North South Cricket Tournament from 16 to19 October in Pretoria will be announced.","html":"At the end of Michaelmas Week, the team that will participate in the North South Cricket Tournament from 16 to19 October in Pretoria will be announced."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The president at SWD Cricket, Michael Eksteen, congratulated the players on their inclusion and complimented the Hub cricket programme in the province for its achievements. \"SWD Cricket has a well-run and efficient Hub Development Programme and in the inclusion of three players from one province - the most from any affiliate - underlines the quality of the programme,\" he said.","html":"The president at SWD Cricket, Michael Eksteen, congratulated the players on their inclusion and complimented the Hub cricket programme in the province for its achievements. \"SWD Cricket has a well-run and efficient Hub Development Programme and in the inclusion of three players from one province - the most from any affiliate - underlines the quality of the programme,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enathi Kitshini","html":"Enathi Kitshini"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keano Coerecius Photo: SWD Cricket","html":"Keano Coerecius Photo: SWD Cricket"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
